summary: Fix failing tests in compliance-service by addressing UUID handling, database foreign key constraints, and adding comprehensive test fixtures for compliance tables

user_stories.i_want: proper test fixtures for compliance tables (compliance_controls, audit_logs, compliance_reports, data_breaches, remediation_plans, compliance_findings, compliance_evidence)
user_stories.so_that: tests can run reliably without foreign key constraint violations
acceptance_criteria: All compliance tables have valid test data fixtures
Foreign key constraints are properly satisfied
UUIDs are valid and reference existing records where required

user_stories.i_want: the compliance_reports.generated_by column to be nullable or have a system user handling
user_stories.so_that: reports can be generated without a valid user session
acceptance_criteria: OR a special system user record exists for auto-generated reports
Tests verify report generation without user context

user_stories.i_want: audit_log table to work with compliance service tests
user_stories.so_that: audit events can be created during compliance testing
acceptance_criteria: audit_log retention_date column is properly handled
Tests can create audit events without violating foreign key constraints
Audit event queries work correctly with test data

user_stories.i_want: migrations to run before tests execute via internal/testutil
user_stories.so_that: all required tables exist when tests run
acceptance_criteria: Migration 000032 is executed during test setup
All compliance tables exist in test database

user_stories.i_want: test coverage for nullable foreign key columns in compliance tables
user_stories.so_that: we ensure NULL values are handled correctly throughout the service
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify NULL values work for user_id references
Tests verify NULL values work for organization_id references
Repository layer handles NULL values correctly

functional_requirements.title: Fix compliance_reports.generated_by Foreign Key
functional_requirements.description: The generated_by column in compliance_reports table is NOT NULL but references users(id). This prevents report generation without a valid user. Need to either make it nullable or create a system user.

functional_requirements.title: Add Compliance Test Fixtures
functional_requirements.description: Create test fixture functions in internal/testutil/fixtures.go for compliance tables: compliance_controls, data_breaches, remediation_plans, compliance_findings, compliance_evidence, compliance_reports, audit_log entries.

functional_requirements.title: Update TruncateAllTables for Compliance Tables
functional_requirements.description: Add compliance tables to the TruncateAllTables function in internal/testutil/db.go to enable proper cleanup between tests.

functional_requirements.title: Verify Migration Execution
functional_requirements.description: Ensure migration 000032_create_compliance_tables.up.sql is executed during test setup via RunMigrations.

functional_requirements.title: Add Test for Report Generation
functional_requirements.description: Add test for generateReportHandler to ensure compliance_reports table insertion works correctly with the generated_by constraint.

non_functional_requirements.requirement: All foreign key constraints must be satisfied for test data
non_functional_requirements.metric: 100% of tests pass without FK violations

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Tests must be deterministic and independent
non_functional_requirements.metric: Tests can run in any order and pass

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Test fixtures must be reusable across services
non_functional_requirements.metric: Fixtures in internal/testutil shared by compliance and other services

api_endpoints.description: Generate compliance report - needs to handle NULL generated_by
Create audit event - needs to handle NULL user_id

risks.risk: Foreign key constraint violations when inserting test data without valid users
risks.mitigation: Create user fixtures first, or make FK columns nullable

risks.risk: Report generation fails when generated_by is 'system' (not a valid UUID)
risks.mitigation: Make generated_by nullable or create a system user record

risks.risk: Tests pass locally but fail in CI due to migration order issues
risks.mitigation: Ensure migrations run in correct order via testutil

implementation_phases.name: Schema Fixes
tasks: Create migration to make generated_by nullable in compliance_reports
Create migration to make created_by, closed_by nullable in compliance_findings
Create migration to make collected_by nullable in compliance_evidence

implementation_phases.name: Test Utilities Update
tasks: Update TruncateAllTables to include compliance tables
Verify migration 000032 is executed in test setup

implementation_phases.name: Test Enhancement
tasks: Add test for report generation endpoint
Add test for audit log creation with nullable user_id
Add test for compliance findings with nullable created_by/closed_by
